daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of engineers in and around Ashforge Citadel, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Citadel workable through the obligations of engineers while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the underlying system working while everyone notices it only when stress, wear, or neglect begin to show. Around Ashforge Citadel, that usually means carrying house rivalry, forge accidents, ashfall damage without letting the role of engineers visibly slip.
